rationale: The citing paper explicitly studies how extended-warranty demand and price sensitivity vary by macroeconomic conditions, while the cited paper’s core contribution is business-cycle moderation of price elasticity and advertising effectiveness. This direct construct overlap (business cycle and price sensitivity shifts in contractions/expansions) suggests the citation could be a substantive prior-knowledge source rather than an incidental mention. With only DOI-level match and no in-text snippet, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
